title: rosa obtusifolia f. froeri
intro: Rosa obtusifolia f. froeri, also known as the Chinese rose or prickly rose, is a plant species in the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion. Rosa obtusifolia f. froeri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being and treat various health conditions.
